title: dasyglossum fractum
side_effects: Dasyglossum fractum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and stomach cramps in some individuals due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can lead to more severe health issues, including liver damage and respiratory problems. In rare cases, Dasyglossum fractum may interact with certain medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions or causing allergic reactions. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using Dasyglossum fractum or any other plant for medicinal purposes.
